name: sub-agent-multiplex
description: NanoClaw on Agent Substrate PoC with Real WhatsApp Integration

scripts.build: esbuild workload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/agent.js --external:node:* && esbuild ui/demo-ui.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/demo-ui.js --external:node:* && esbuild broker/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/broker.js --external:node:*
